data.title: The Universe is Speaking, It's Time to Listen: New Book Channels Messages from Akashic Records
data.description: Janie MacMillian, an author, brings forth a message centered around connection, self-exploration, and vibrancy following ten years of delving into Akashic Record studies. Hailing from Columbus, Ohio, this news was announced on March 30, 2026. Having amassed various holistic certifications, MacMillian emphasizes the profound insights that individuals may discover through exploring the Akashic Records.

data.title: Coming-of-Age Novel Explores Identity, Privilege, and the Cost of the American Dream
data.description: Introducing Ray Mundo, a teenage Mexican American who recently secured a scholarship to attend a prestigious preparatory school in Los Angeles. Recent data from the United States Census Bureau revealed that in 2020, around 25.7% of children in the country are of Hispanic or Latino descent. This demonstrates the growing diversity among the younger population in the United States.

data.title: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP Reports Q4 2025 Results, Improved Balance Sheet and Demonstrated Hotel Value
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On March 30, 2026, American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP, also known as "AHIP," published its financial outcomes for the periods ending on December 31, 2025. The company's reports encompass the three-month and full-year data for that period. AHIP's trading symbols on the Toronto Stock Exchange are HOT.UN, HOT.U, and HOT.DB.V.

data.title: BTC may crash as oil prices hit over $105, 3-year high. Historical data suggests Bitcoin bear markets worsen during oil price spikes.
data.description: In the past, analysis has revealed that Bitcoin tends to experience more significant downturns during periods of record-high oil prices. Given the recent surge in WTI crude oil reaching $105 on Monday, there are concerns about a potential crash in Bitcoin prices. Historical data suggests a correlation between oil price spikes and bear markets for Bitcoin, raising speculation about the impact of the current $105 WTI price on the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: TruBridge Announces Rescheduled Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Conference Call to Be Held Tuesday, March 31, 2026
data.description: TruBridge, Inc., a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider for rural and community hospitals, disclosed that it will reveal its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025, on March 31, 2026. The postponed initial earnings release date and related earnings call were rescheduled from March 16, 2026, to provide more time for the completion of the year-end audit process. TruBridge, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TBRG.
